notes: Rung 1: Pd-only log-linear regression, Wu & Kanamori 2005 style.
Rung 1: Pd-only log-linear regression, Wu & Kanamori 2005 style.

Rung 5: split architecture. Universal Physics Encoder (3-component CNN, GroupNorm) + Regional Site Encoder (MLP on Vs30, CRUST1 Vp, sediment thickness, NEHRP one-hot, instrument one-hot) + Fusion head. Trained on California with event-grouped train/val and Ridgecrest/Coso geographic holdout. Physics branch takes only the waveform (hard rule #5).

Transfer to Greece (Hellenic subduction + normal faulting). Zero-shot evaluation + few-shot fine-tune of site encoder + fusion head with the universal encoder frozen, at n ∈ {100, 500, 2000}. From-scratch baseline at each budget for comparison.
